mapper.select: select id, title, content, author, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from notices order by created_at desc
select id, title, content, author, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from notices where id = #{id}
select count(*) from notices where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into notices (title, content, author, created_at) values (#{title}, #{content}, #{author}, current_timestamp)
mapper.update: update notices set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
